content: Device flow security: (1) Rate limit the /approve-device page's code verification endpoint - per-IP, max 5 attempts in 15min window using existing auth tier limits. (2) device_code should be high entropy (32+ bytes, not user-facing) - use randomBytes(32).toString('hex'). (3) user_code is 8 chars base-20 (same CODE_CHARS alphabet as pairing.ts minus confusable chars). (4) Single-use: atomically set status=approved and userId together, prevent second approval. (5) Polling itself is low risk since device_code is 64 hex chars - impossible to brute force. (6) Expired codes must be garbage-collected to prevent DB bloat.
